# prompt-evolver

> Autonomous prompt evolution for claude-code-factory

## What is this?

prompt-evolver is a Go CLI that optimizes the prompts used by claude-code-factory (an autonomous software factory). It analyzes build outcomes (shipped vs failed), identifies failure patterns, generates improved prompts using Claude, A/B tests them, and deploys the winners.

## Key commands

- `prompt-evolver analyze` -- analyze build outcomes from SQLite registry
- `prompt-evolver evolve` -- generate improved prompts via Claude
- `prompt-evolver test` -- A/B test old vs new prompts
- `prompt-evolver deploy` -- deploy improved prompts to factory repo

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/timholm/prompt-evolver
- Language: Go
- License: MIT

## Integration

Works with claude-code-factory's SQLite build registry and prompt template system. Reads `registry.db`, writes `.md.tmpl` files.
